title: When It Comes Night
content:
"When it comes night,
    We put out the light.
    Some blow with a puff,
    Some turn down and snuff;
    But neat folks prefer
    A nice extinguis_her_.
    So here I send you back
    One to put on Mr. Jack."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Louisa May Alcott, titled "When It Comes Night", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
